programme.title: The American Game: Recruiting
programme.desc: Everything starts with the quality of the players that a school is able to recruit. Since college football's earliest days, recruiting has been one of the most critical and controversial aspects of the sport.

programme.title: The Greatest: Walk-Ons
programme.desc: There's a difference, it turns out, between impossible and improbable. In college football's long history, there have been a handful of incredible stories of walk-ons who became stars. These are the top 11 of all time.

programme.title: The Greatest: Inspiring Moments
programme.desc: If the best parts of sports are how they can inspire people, college football has enjoyed a wealth of unforgettable moments that fans will cherish forever. These are the top 11 of those highlights, on the field and off.

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: Movie: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: In high school, Bob Stone was a bullied geek and Calvin was popular. Years later, Bob returns as a lethal CIA agent that needs Calvin, who's now an accountant, to help solve a major case. The two enter a world of espionage that could get them killed.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Anything Can Happen Recurrence
programme.desc: When Sheldon tries to be spontaneous, it leads to unexpected friction between Penny, Amy and Bernadette. Meanwhile, Raj seeks Howard's help in preparing for a date with Emily.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Proton Transmogrification
programme.desc: Professor Proton helps Sheldon cope with grief, while Leonard turns a relationship milestone into a competition with Penny. Meanwhile, Amy and Bernadette make a 'Star Wars Day' gift for the guys.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Gorilla Dissolution
programme.desc: A bad day causes Penny to re-evaluate her life choices, including Leonard. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette struggle to care for Mrs. Wolowitz, and Raj gets relationship advice from Sheldon.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Status Quo Combustion
programme.desc: With his entire world changing around him, Sheldon considers a major move.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Locomotion Interruption
programme.desc: Leonard and Amy take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick-up Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny interviews for a job at Bernadette's company and Howard is weirded out by Stuart's relationship with Mrs. Wolowitz.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Junior Professor Solution
programme.desc: When Sheldon is forced to teach a class, Howard surprises everyone by taking it. Meanwhile, the tension between Penny and Bernadette gives Amy a chance to play both sides.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Movie: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Viola Field's fall from grace as a successful television journalist has left her looking for control in her life. When her son announces his engagement to a working-class woman, Viola sets out to ruin her son's marriage before it gets started.

programme.title: Movie: Yes Man
programme.desc: Carl Allen is without a girlfriend and barely hanging on to his friends. His job has no forward momentum. Everything is at a stand still until he is required to say yes to every opportunity that comes his way. His life is turned upside down overnight.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the ATM
programme.desc: Max decides to break-up with Deke now that she knows about his wealthy background.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Married Man Sleepover
programme.desc: Caroline asks Max and Deke to join her on her dinner date at Nicolas' loft to help make sure she doesn't do anything she might regret. Also, Max and Caroline treat themselves to very special hair appointments.

programme.title: New Girl: LAXmas
programme.desc: As the gang prepares to depart for the holidays, they quickly find they may be home alone when they are all trapped at the airport.

programme.title: New Girl: Shark
programme.desc: After Winston graduates from the Police Academy, Nick and Coach worry when they see his new training officer. Meanwhile, Jess uses Schmidt to try and influence a councilwoman to stop the night construction taking place outside the loft.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Angry Family
programme.desc: The Barones are mortified when Ray's son, Michael, writes a story about an angry family.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: No Roll
programme.desc: Ray brings home an adult board game in an attempt to spice things up in the bedroom.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Frank becomes extremely jealous when Marie starts spending time with his friend, Marco.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Despite Ross' protests, Rachel agrees to let her self-indulgent sister baby-sit baby Emma.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's Grant
programme.desc: Ross must apply to a Nobel prize winning scientist for a palaeontology grant.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Home Study
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler get a visit from the adoption agency and learn that Joey once dated their case worker. Ross gets Rachel to face her fear of swings by facing his fear of spiders.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: A tomboy FBI agent goes undercover in a beauty pageant to prevent a terrorist bombing.

programme.title: Movie: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Viola Field's fall from grace as a successful television journalist has left her looking for control in her life. When her son announces his engagement to a working-class woman, Viola sets out to ruin her son's marriage before it gets started.

programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour Weekend
programme.desc: In-depth analysis of current events with news summaries, discussions, and news pieces.

programme.title: The Ivory Tower
programme.desc: Dean David Rubin hosts this discussion about local events with academicians.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Junk in the Trunk - Nine
programme.desc: Discover never-before-seen appraisals from all five Season 23 cities, including 1949 Charles and Ray Eames molded chairs, a Sioux pipe and pipe bag made around 1880, and a 1953 MAD Issue 8 'Frank N. Stein' story.

programme.title: The Lawrence Welk Show: Musical Tour of Europe
programme.desc: Guy Hovis, Lawrence and the gang take a make-believe trip to Europe. Things get going with 'Around the World,' and then Bobby and Cissy do a Spanish dance based on the art of bull fighting to 'Espana Cani.' Norma does some fast stepping to 'Danke Schoen.'

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances: The Candlelight Supper
programme.desc: Hyacinth plans to hold a celebrated candlelight supper in order to impress Emmet.

programme.title: Fawlty Towers: A Touch of Class
programme.desc: Basil tries to improve the class of the hotel's clientele with remarkable results.

programme.title: Movie: Chinatown
programme.desc: A private detective's investigation of an affair leads to murder and huge cover-ups.

programme.title: Austin City Limits: Steve Earle & The Dukes: A Tribute to Guy Clark
programme.desc: Steve Earle performs the songs of his mentor, Guy Clark.

programme.title: A Chef's Life: King Cornbread
programme.desc: Vivian films a segment for a morning TV show where cornbread takes center stage. She stops by a Kinston institution that merges cornbread with another Southern signature to create a handheld delicacy called 'the pig and a puppy.'

programme.title: Nova: Why Bridges Collapse
programme.desc: Experts compare what happened to the Polcevera with other deadly bridge collapses, including Minnesota's I-35W bridge over the Mississippi and the famed Silver Bridge over the Ohio River.

programme.title: Nature: Undercover in the Jungle
programme.desc: Go undercover with a film crew on a perilous journey to the untouched wilderness of biodiversity in the Amazon rainforest. Meet some of its most incredible creatures, from pygmy marmosets to pumas.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis: Survivors
programme.desc: As the urban world grows animals are displaced from land that belonged to them. From herons to humpback whales, follow the captivating stories of wild survivors.

programme.title: Soundbreaking: Going Electric
programme.desc: From the invention of the electric guitar to synthesized music, learn how innovators used electricity to unleash new and never-before-heard sounds. Reveal the power of technology to continuously redefine music.

programme.title: Earth Focus: Adaptation to Global Water Shortages
programme.desc: Western Morocco and California's Central Valley turn to technology for answers to future water needs.

programme.title: Growing a Greener World: Catching Up With TV Garden Legend Paul James
programme.desc: The latest trends in eco-friendly living mixed with traditional gardening know-how.

programme.title: Classical Stretch: By Essentrics: Hips and Hamstring Workout
programme.desc: This episode features an all-barre workout that strengthens and stretches all 650 muscles of the body.

programme.title: Music and the Spoken Word
programme.desc: Modern and traditional arrangements of classical and patriotic music is featured.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel Fixes Trolley/ Problem Solver Daniel
programme.desc: Daniel breaks a wheel off Trolley while playing and figures out how to fix it on his own.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Plantastically Pink/ Painting Pixie
programme.desc: Pinkalicious plants the seed of the most beautiful flower in the world, the Pinkabloom. She soon learns the only way to make it grow is by singing to it. With help from Peter and friends the Pinkabloom grows to the size of a house, but it won't bloom.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: First Fish/ A-maze-ing Snow
programme.desc: Molly can’t wait to catch her first fish but when she gets to the river, the only thing she catches is Tooey's missing boot. Molly suggests a community fun-raiser to fix her school roof after a snow storm.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: You Can't Move the Moon/ Lizardzilla!
programme.desc: In Tokyo, when Salami Strong gets injured and can't do his act, Carmen enlists a Sumo wrestler to put on an exhibition match with Luna instead.

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog: Circus Stars/ Limelight Fright

programme.title: Make48

programme.title: SciTech Now

programme.title: Consuelo Mack WealthTrack

programme.title: To the Contrary
programme.desc: A program examining major issues with women of various ethnic and political backgrounds.

programme.title: Nature: Animals With Cameras

programme.title: City in the Sky: Airborne
programme.desc: Examine the hidden army that keeps your plane safe, and explore just what it takes to keep the 'city in the sky' functioning and safe between take-off and landing. Learn why flying has become safer than ever.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots: In Search of Freedom
programme.desc: Learn how the ancestors of Maya Rudolph, Shonda Rhimes and Keenen Ivory Wayans struggled for freedom, and how each of these cultural trailblazers gains a new understanding of how they fit into this proud trajectory.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe: Romania

programme.title: Movie: Red 2

programme.title: Movie: The Magnificent Seven

programme.title: Treadstone: The Cicada Protocol

programme.title: 31 Nights of Halloween Fan Fest
programme.desc: Celebrate Halloween's biggest pop culture moments and icons of the season from Hollywood Forever Cemetery in Los Angeles, California.

programme.title: Movie: Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: In 1693 Salem, three sisters are executed for practicing witchcraft. Three hundred years later, a sceptic named Max explores the ruins of the legendary witches' house and dares the witches to manifest themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Zootopia
programme.desc: A wily con artist and a rookie cop work together to unravel a mysterious conspiracy.

programme.title: Movie: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Three parapsychologists open a ghost removal business in New York City, but soon find that they may be up against something far worse.

programme.title: Movie: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: A team of ghost chasers work to save New York from an evil spirit that resides in a portrait.

programme.title: Movie: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: An account of the second Persian invasion of Greece in 480-479 BC. A Greek general attempts to unite all of Greece by leading an attack against the invading Persian army led by an immortal and the vengeful commander of the Persian army.

programme.title: Movie: Batman Begins
programme.desc: As a boy, Bruce Wayne watched helplessly as his parents were murdered in front of him. Determined to get revenge, he studies with a dangerous ninja cult leader and, upon his return to Gotham City, uses his skills against the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: With the help of District Attorney Harvey Dent and Lieutenant James Gordon, Batman battles a madman known as the Joker who causes terror and mayhem for fun.

programme.title: Movie: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A government official puts together a team of psychotic and evil supervillains to undertake dangerous suicide missions in return for clemency. Led by Rick Flagg and Deadshot, this 'suicide squad' attempts to save the world and have fun doing it.

programme.title: Movie: The Rock

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Course Correction
programme.desc: NCIS and the FBI investigate a private plane crash in the bayou that killed three sailors. Also, Sonja and Lasalle interview candidates for the team's open agent position.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: One Good Man
programme.desc: The team reviews unorthodox training exercises after a Navy Seal candidate is found murdered weeks before his graduation. Also, a concerned Wade turns to Pride after her adopted son, Danny, announces his plan to enter the Navy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Outlaws
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a sailor during a rowdy motorcycle rally in the city. Also, Lasalle turns to Gregorio for advice on his personal life.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Music to My Ears
programme.desc: After a petty officer and member of the prestigious United States Navy Band is murdered in her home, Pride takes temporary custody of the victim's nephew, who is the sole witness to the crime.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Overdrive
programme.desc: After a marine corporal who is an amateur racecar driver has a fatal crash on the track, the NCIS team investigates when they suspect foul play.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 3

programme.title: Movie: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A government official puts together a team of psychotic and evil supervillains to undertake dangerous suicide missions in return for clemency. Led by Rick Flagg and Deadshot, this 'suicide squad' attempts to save the world and have fun doing it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Steel Mill Worker
programme.desc: Mike works with a river barge demolition team then melts down the scrap steel into molten metal.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Floating Fish Factory
programme.desc: Mike travels to Alaska and explores how fish are prepared aboard a processing ship.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Ice Salvage Crew
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty in Alaska as he helps protect the environment.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sheep Castrator
programme.desc: Mike works at an automobile dealership where the job is sawing down a giant concrete wall to make room for a new washbay, then heads to a sheep farm where he tries his hand at sheep shearing & castrating before getting treated to Rocky Mountain Oysters.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leech Trapper
programme.desc: Mike teams up with the boys from Bartos Bait & Fish to catch leeches that will later be sold for fish bait; then it's off to the Green Tripe factory in Hollister, CA where Mike helps make BARF (Biologically Appropriate Raw Food) for dogs.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Vellum Maker

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Abandoned Mine Plugger
programme.desc: Mike travels to Ohio to check on the Common Tern population and then he finds himself in Northern California plugging an abandoned mineshaft.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Salt Miner
programme.desc: Mike goes underground packing explosives into a wall of salt and blowing it up in order to break up the salt into small blocks. Mike masters the dirty job of salt mining and gets a new respect for the people who get dirty so the public can have salt.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Steam Ship Cleaner
programme.desc: Travelling to San Diego, Mike joins forces with two dirty guys who have mastered the art of hydro seeding. Before diving into the mailbag to answer viewer's questions, Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty on a steam ship that's over 100 years old.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Barber
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and the crew travel to the Spring Brook Ranch in Kalispell, Montana to join forces with a yak and bison rancher who put him to work.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Special Effects Artist
programme.desc: Mike exposes the fascinating secrets behind the dirty world of special effects. He explores this very strange world as special effects artist, Toby Sells, transforms him into a real life zombie. Also, Mike gets dirty harvesting kelp.

programme.title: Hell and Back: Special Ops Ranger
programme.desc: Soldiers go through 8 weeks of intense physical testing designed to induce stress and expose their true characters.

programme.title: Raised Hunting: The Gift

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A destructive F4 tornado rips through a town. A propane plant fire prompts 12,000 people to evacuate. Police chase a semi-truck. A truck loaded with explosives crashes, and a GT racecar crashes through a barrier, flips, and bursts into flames.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: Lightning hits an oil tank causing it to explode; a fighter jet crashes during a show.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: An F-18 jet crash lands; a car flies before crashing at 230 mph; a small fire leads to massive explosions at a gas terminal; a skier barely survives a 100-foot jump and a crew of 11 is rescued just before a cargo ship sinks.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A propane explosion in Australia, a tornado destroys a ranch in Kansas.

programme.title: Gold Rush: A New Rush Begins

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Picture Perfect Cabin
programme.desc: Mark's client has a painting of a log cabin he wants to replicate so the team sets out to find the perfect cabin for the job. After settling on a cabin from an old project, the Barnwood Builders rebuild the structure with its huge logs in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cowboy Party Barn in New Braunfels, TX
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to Texas to build a gigantic party barn out of an old timber frame. They use old-fashioned tools to retrofit the barn for modern use, and they install a rare swing beam in the center bent.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Old-School Takedown in Harrisville, WV
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn to the old-school method of using ropes to take down a log cabin in Harrisville, West Virginia. Later on, they shop at the oldest five-and-dime in America, and meet some modern day pioneers who hewed their own log cabin by hand.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding After the Flood
programme.desc: Nearby, the town of White Sulphur Springs was devastated by a recent flood. Mark and the guys step up to help their neighbour rebuild. They repair a garage by wrapping it in barnwood and use log skins to transform a shed into a playroom.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hope Rises in White Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After the flood waters recede, the Barnwood Builders join the recovery efforts in their hometown of White Sulphur Springs, WV. They build a timber frame pavilion as the centerpiece of a memorial park, and the community builds barn wood picnic tables.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Chopper Rescue

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Legend of Boo-Kini Bottom

programme.desc: Ronnie Anne forgoes a family Halloween tradition for a ‘cool' party which isn't fun. When Ronnie Anne learns that Tio Carlos was a skateboarder, she teaches her new moves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tricked!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ New Haunts

programme.title: The Loud House: Kings of the Con

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Swamp Creatures Attack

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Nightmares
programme.desc: Teams create mind-blowing Halloween themed displays that capture nightmares.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Monsters, Monsters, Monsters

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Cravings From the Grave
programme.desc: For the pre-heat, mummy's the word as the six remaining bakers are asked to make a Halloween mummy dessert using pre-made pie dough. Next, the bakers must create a candy-stuffed, wicked cake based on a Halloween icon.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Haunted Circus
programme.desc: Things are only getting spookier with just five bakers left in the competition, who must head to the haunted circus for the pre-heat and create a dozen scary clown cake pops.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Spirits Rising
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers connect with the other side, baking up a tomb dessert for the pre-heat. The bakers make a dessert inspired by the colorful artistry and spirit of Mexico's Dia de los Muertos, or Day of the Dead.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Ginger Dead House
programme.desc: The three remaining bakers must fill a haunted tree with decorated Halloween cookies. For the grand finale, the bakers have just six hours to construct a spooky 'ginger dead' house.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Burger Bash
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges his talented chef friends to take a burger beyond the basic patty and bun. Antonia Lofaso combines sirloin and brisket with braised oxtail for an intensely meaty burger and whips orange juice for a crisp Garibaldi cocktail.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: 4th Down and Yum
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli hosts a football-themed party with former NFL pro and Food Network Star, Eddie Jackson. The touchdown-worthy menu includes slow cooker sloppy Joe sliders, homemade potato chips topped with chicken salt, and roasted carrot hummus.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Kit and Caboodle
programme.desc: For delicious, time-saving dinners, Ree prepares barbecue chicken pizza with spicy slaw, a spicy veggie stir fry and a spinach alfredo pasta bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Takeout at Home
programme.desc: Ree is cooking a takeout treat for her girls, making a surprise dinner of their favorite Chinese food, with cream cheese won tons, orange chicken, beef with broccoli, and stir-fried chow mein.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Souper Good
programme.desc: Ree whips up four stunning soups, starting with the kid-favorite Hamburger Soup. Tomato Soup With Parmesan Croutons makes an incredible make-ahead freezer dish. Sausage, Potato and Kale Soup is a one-pot wonder and her Spinach Soup is liquid soul food.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Hay There!

programme.desc: Raven enters a beauty pageant in attempts to reconnect with her father.

programme.desc: Beast Boy agrees to share his birthday with Starfire after learning that she's never had one on Earth.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Streak

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Balloon Boys

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Silence

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Like Buffalo
programme.desc: When Jake imitates one of Charlie's sexist remarks, Judith's support group decides that Charlie's home is an unfit environment for the child. Charlie is forced to cajole the group into letting Jake continue to spend the weekends at his place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Can You Feel My Finger?
programme.desc: After Charlie has yet another pregnancy scare, Alan suggests he get a vasectomy. Charlie's doctor recommends freezing some sperm in case he changes his mind about having children, but things don't go quite as planned.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Back Off, Mary Poppins
programme.desc: When Alan learns that Charlie belongs to an exclusive male support group, he begs to join.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Enjoy Those Garlic Balls

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Bag Full of Jawea

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Go Get Mommy's Bra
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to trade cars with his mother for a day and ends up with major regrets.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bad News From the Clinic?
programme.desc: Charlie falls head over heals for a woman who plays hard to get better than he does.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Price of Healthy Gums Is Eternal Vigilance
programme.desc: Alan's self image is shaken when Charlie admits to having played a dirty trick on him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Kosher Slaughterhouse Out in Fontana
programme.desc: To be a good example for Jake, who has been disrespectful lately to his mother, Charlie and Alan grudgingly agree to throw their own mother a party to celebrate her real estate achievements.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Frankenstein and the Horny Villagers
programme.desc: Alan meets an attractive woman who introduces him to the kind of sex Charlie is accustomed to.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Yes, Monsignor
programme.desc: Charlie's ex-flame returns to his life with a little more baggage than when she left.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Salmon Under My Sweater
programme.desc: While Jake helps Charlie write a cartoon theme song, things heat up between Alan and Rose.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Last Chance to See Those Tattoos
programme.desc: Charlie discovers that his promiscuous lifestyle is now the subject of an angry web site.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Lungful of Alan
programme.desc: Alan's beautiful best friend from high school visits, creating a rivalry between Alan and Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Zejdz Zmoich Wlosow
programme.desc: When an earthquake bursts the water pipes in Judith's home, Alan invites her to say with him at Charlie's.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Those Big Pink Things With Coconuts
programme.desc: Evelyn takes drastic measures to get back into the lives of her sons and grandson.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Smell the Umbrella Stand
programme.desc: Charlie tries to take Alan to Las Vegas in order to distract him from a medical procedure.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Can You Eat Human Flesh With Wooden Teeth?
programme.desc: A stressed Judith goes to Hawaii, leaving Jake with Alan and Charlie for an entire week.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Woo-Hoo, a Hernia Exam!
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to see the doctor after he injures himself in the act of making love.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water
programme.desc: When Christine learns that her close friends, Barb and Pete, are responsible for introducing Richard to his new girlfriend named Christine, she allows them to set her up on a blind date of her own. Meanwhile, Matthew takes Ritchie to swimming lessons.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: One Toe Over the Line, Sweet Jesus
programme.desc: Richard plays the part of the jealous ex-husband when he learns that Christine is enjoying her fifth date with a new beau, Burton. He even goes as far as to sabotage the happy couple's goodnight kiss and intentionally insults Burton.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I'll Show You Mine
programme.desc: After 10 dates, Christine faces a critical moment in her relationship with Burton. Will she or won't she? Let him in the house, that is, to meet her son, Ritchie. She eventually relents, only to be thrown for a loop later.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Other F Word
programme.desc: Christine's attempt to promote racial and ethnic diversity at Ritchie's exclusive private school has unintended consequences.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Long Day Journey Into Stan
programme.desc: Following Christine's break-up with Burton, everyone expects her to fall apart emotionally but she insists she is fine and looking forward to spending time alone. But after being humiliated in a restaurant she realizes that she really did care for him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Teach Your Children Well
programme.desc: Christine feels pressured to throw an extravagant party for Ritchie's birthday, his first involving kids from his new school. Recoiling from sticker shock after meeting with an event planner, Christine decides to have an arts and crafts party at home.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's New Friend
programme.desc: Dorothy befriends a novelist, Barbara Thorndyke, and she quickly infringes on Dorothy's relationship with Blanche and Rose, who think Barbara is nothing but a stuck up snob.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough
programme.desc: The girls fly to Los Angeles to appear on their favourite game show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Ma Makes Three
programme.desc: Feeling sorry for a lonely Sophia, Dorothy allows her to come along on a date with her and Dorothy's latest beau. However, pretty soon Sophia begins tagging along on every date which puts a rift in Dorothy's romantic plans.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Larceny and Old Lace
programme.desc: Sophia's latest boyfriend, Rocco, claims to have been involved in the mob. When the girls discover a bag of Rocco's with thousands of dollars in it, they assume he robbed a bank.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose's Big Adventure
programme.desc: Rose's latest boyfriend has just retired and she is ready to spend a whole lot more time with him, but his retirement quickly turns him into a couch potato. Meanwhile, the girls deal with remodeling the garage into a guest room.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mixed Blessing
programme.desc: Dorothy's son, Michael, pays another visit and this time he has an announcement: he's engaged. However, Dorothy has two more surprises in store.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mister Terrific
programme.desc: Rose begins to date 'Mr. Terrific', a kiddie show host, who gets fired when Dorothy gets a part-time job as a consultant on the show, a job he helped her get.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mother's Day
programme.desc: While waiting for phone calls from their children wishing them a happy Mother's Day, the girls reminisce about past Mother's Days.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Yes, We Have No Havanas
programme.desc: Blanche's latest boyfriend is a charming Cuban who sweeps her off her feet, but she's not the only one when Blanche discovers he's been dating Sophia behind her back.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Days and Nights of Sophia Petrillo
programme.desc: Sophia organizes a band to raise money, volunteers at the hospital and battles return policies at the supermarket.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Blanche is determined to sleep with the one man who has refused her once in the past. Meanwhile, Rose claims to have seen a UFO and gets the Air Force involved.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Yokel Hero
programme.desc: Rose vies for St. Olaf's award for the Woman of the Year.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bang the Drum, Stanley
programme.desc: Stan takes Dorothy and Sophia to a ballgame and asks them for a loan.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding
programme.desc: Sophia refuses to attend an old friend's funeral because her husband Max will be there.

programme.desc: The Australia Zoo's Alligator Snapping Turtles need a health check, and it's Robert's job to protect from their fierce bites. Terri and Bindi welcome seven new Lemurs from the US. The Zoo's Rescue Unit is called to save possums caught in a chimney.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bosco the Croc's Big Move
programme.desc: Robert takes on the challenging task of relocating Bosco, the most aggressive croc at the zoo. Bindi must investigate Forest the giraffe's bad knee problem. Terri helps Harley the koala find love at the end of a difficult breeding season.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Extra Bites: Robert's Python Swim

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Aloha Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Amanda and her kids travel to Hawaii, where they meet dogs perfect for Panda Paws: a deaf mother-daughter Catahoula duo, Loco Moco, a puppy who may be blind and Super Scootie, a senior in need of a home after years of neglect.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Professor Clovis and the Hamburglar
programme.desc: The rescue receives two new residents - Professor Clovis, a miniature schnauzer with a suspected liver shunt who needs a complicated and costly surgery and Hamburglar, a blind puppy who Amanda prepares for his new forever family.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Unleashed
programme.desc: Pit Bull rescuer Tia Torres reflects on the events of the first season of 'Pit Bulls and Parolees', and looks ahead to the second season.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Road Trip Rescue
programme.desc: Carrying three baby kangaroos and an emu, the Irwins caravan into the Australian Outback to release the animals on Mourachan, their giant wildlife conservation property. Plans shift when they discover more animals in need of rescue along the way.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Shrimping Ain't Easy
programme.desc: Poached shrimp is a delicacy for most, but for the Washington State Fish and Wildlife Police it's a criminal offense and Sgt. Olson is on the case to bust a culprit.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Dangerous Confrontations
programme.desc: An unmedicated bi-polar schizophrenic drifter has set up camp in the park and is questioned by the officers while another officer encounters a couple violating a strict no-contact order.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Smoke on the Water
programme.desc: The annual Seattle Seafair is one the biggest parties on the water which means the Fish and Wildlife officers will be clocking overtime busting plenty of people taking the party too far.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Trouble
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau, K9 Ruby and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunter suspected of shooting a turkey from the road. Officer McKee searches for a baby owl that fell from its nest. And Officer Hannett rushes to lead a carryout when a hiker is injured.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided
programme.desc: Officer Hannett is tested trying to capture an injured goose. Officer Lucas is the first responder on scene for a drug overdose. And Officer MacFadzen must climb 40 feet into the treetops to deal with an aggressive hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hunting the Hunters
programme.desc: Officers Adam Cheney and Geoff Pushee run into an aggressive and angry hunter while investigating a road hunting complaint.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fighting the Flood
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas intervenes when a black bear cub gets separated from its mother and wreaks havoc on a small community. As heavy rains cause rivers to flood, Officer Eric Fluette races to rescue a man whose canoe has flipped in the rapids.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: Crime 360: Final Call

programme.title: Crime 360: Killing Field
programme.desc: On the morning of July 5th, the body of a victim is found in an abandoned lot that had been used to shoot off guns the night before in celebration in Independence Day. More than 60 shell casings are collected from the crime scene.

programme.title: Crime 360: Payback

programme.title: Crime 360: Blunt Force Killer

programme.desc: Det. Mocello responds to the scene of a suspicious fire in the bedroom of a first-floor apartment. He soon discovers that the deceased victim's charred body has sustained serious trauma.

programme.title: City Confidential: Durham: Dangerous Housewife
programme.desc: A philandering and big-spending wife is suspected of killing her husband to get his money.

programme.title: City Confidential: Boston: Betrayal in Beantown
programme.desc: When the Boston police are fooled into believing a black man killed a pregnant white woman, the city is the scene of strong racism.

programme.title: City Confidential: Bad News in Battle Creek
programme.desc: Residents of a peaceful Michigan city are shocked when a local TV anchorwoman is murdered.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carlsbad: Danger in the Desert
programme.desc: Johnny Volpato, a popular politician and pharmacist, was accused of shooting his wife.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Let's Play Pirate
programme.desc: When Nikki Orvin fell in love and married Damon Bamberg she had no idea what a twisted family she was now a part of. Soon after giving birth to Damon's son, Nikki realized that she was not the only woman in her husband's life.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Breakfast for a Dead Man
programme.desc: A likeable and hard working father is found murdered and questions are raised about his family.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Rum Chaser/ Murder for Nothing
programme.desc: Darlene George and her 13-year-old son are the victims of a random home invasion robbery. But when police arrive, Darlene's husband, Winston George is found in the basement, hog-tied and strangled.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Daddy's Girls
programme.desc: Tensions arise when a new addition to the Finkle family shakes up their peaceful dynamic, but no one could predict the fatal and gruesome results to come.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Drowning in Despair
programme.desc: The accidental drowning of their two children strains Lonnie and Betty Jo Fowler's marriage to the breaking point. But after reconciling and moving closer to family, a sister-in-law's suspicions turn violent.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Demon Inside
programme.desc: Charity seems like your typical teenager, she's a popular cheerleader with good grades and and works at the local pizza parlor. But to her mother and sisters, Charity is possessed by a demon that needs to be dealt with.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Come With Me
programme.desc: After a failed relationship, 22-year-old Jennifer Hitchcock thinks she may have finally found that special someone when she meets Maurice Mason. But as soon as Maurice moves in, she can't help but feel as though someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Black Widow
programme.desc: Gary Taylor knows what people say about Catherine Mehaffey. Still, when he finally meets the sexy lawyer, he just can't stay away. But it's only a matter of time before Gary realizes he's made a grave mistake and breaking things off won't come easy.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Presents: Homicide: Murder He Wrote
programme.desc: On June 3rd, 2015, 16-year-old Selena Stoian walked into her home to find her worst nightmare realized. Her mother Maria dead, and father Stefan missing. Selena is left to piece together what went wrong with her family in such a short period of time.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Black Widow
programme.desc: Gary Taylor knows what people say about Catherine Mehaffey. Still, when he finally meets the sexy lawyer, he just can't stay away. But it's only a matter of time before Gary realizes he's made a grave mistake and breaking things off won't come easy.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Presents: Homicide: Murder He Wrote
programme.desc: On June 3rd, 2015, 16-year-old Selena Stoian walked into her home to find her worst nightmare realized. Her mother Maria dead, and father Stefan missing. Selena is left to piece together what went wrong with her family in such a short period of time.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Come With Me
programme.desc: After a failed relationship, 22-year-old Jennifer Hitchcock thinks she may have finally found that special someone when she meets Maurice Mason. But as soon as Maurice moves in, she can't help but feel as though someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Homicidal Secrets
programme.desc: When newlyweds Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten kiss each other goodbye on the morning of February 24, 1986, it'll be the last kiss they ever share. Sherri is found dead in their home hours later. Detectives struggle to solve her case for 20 years.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Teenage Rage
programme.desc: When sixteen year old Dinah Peterson sneaks out to see her boyfriend on Valentine's Day, she never makes it home. As the small town gossip spreads, the case takes a shocking turn and a 30 year old secret is finally revealed.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: A Friend to Die For
programme.desc: Detectives search for a suspect in the murder of an art student.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Staged to Kill
programme.desc: Mechanic Ed Postma loves cars, so when he pulls over to a remote convenience store to help with a breakdown, he wasn't expecting to be violently shot to death. Persistent police work uncovers a bitter love triangle fueled by jealousy and rage.

programme.title: Casey Anthony: An American Murder Mystery: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: Casey Anthony insists that her 2-year-old daughter Caylee was abducted by the nanny, but investigators soon discover the child has been missing for 31 days. Where is Caylee?

programme.title: Casey Anthony: An American Murder Mystery: A Shallow Grave
programme.desc: As the Casey Anthony trial begins, the defense unleashes shocking allegations and the prosecution reveals their theory of how Caylee died.

programme.title: Casey Anthony: An American Murder Mystery: Ten Hours, 40 Minutes
programme.desc: As the Casey Anthony trial continues, the defense takes centre stage and the verdict sparks outrage across the country.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Red Jacket
programme.desc: On Valentine's night, 2015, 27-year-old James Enright is stabbed to death outside a busy train station in Burnaby, Canada. Despite cell phone footage of the attack, police struggle to identify his killer, until CCTV leads them to an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Albuquerque Ambush
programme.desc: Don Fluitt is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, security video captures the moments just before the evil deed and a surprising twist will bring this killer to their knees.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Go in There
programme.desc: Beverly Puccio is brutally murdered and found at home by an oddly behaving ex-boyfriend. Detectives use security and traffic cam footage to piece together the last night of her life including an encounter with a mysterious stranger to find her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I Did It
programme.desc: Michelle Kinney is found murdered in her apartment in Dubuque, Iowa. Her neighbours are puzzled as she had no enemies. Local detectives unveil a haunting truth, leading to a shocking confession from an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb. To catch the killer, Det. Joe Kenda must first figure out whom the bomb was meant for.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities, underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time. They have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Outlaw Biker Gangs
programme.desc: A look back at when leather clad hoods turned the motorcycle into a symbol of violence.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Brothels That Built America
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind one of society's most clandestine institutions, brothels. Hidden within these bordellos are secrets about famous patrons, governments, and even religion. Explore why these dens have endured for thousands of years.

programme.title: Outlaw Biker Gangs
programme.desc: A look back at when leather clad hoods turned the motorcycle into a symbol of violence.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities, underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time. They have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: The Real Don of New York
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York. When FBI realised their mistake, they would stop at nothing to take him down.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill its Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Seth Bullock: Sheriff of Deadwood
programme.desc: In Deadwood, a mining camp swirling with violence and vice, Seth Bullock is the only stabilizing force standing in the way of utter chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House

programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Stuccoed to Sell
programme.desc: A couple with too little time to invest in lawn care doesn't think their house will sell in its current state. Chris and Sara rescue their property from dying plants and a mismatched exterior by adding fresh paint, a patio and a stone path.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950 ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough

programme.desc: Classic Italian meets passion, authenticity and innovation at these noteworthy restaurants. Vetri has been called one of the best Italian restaurants in America, presenting simple, fresh, authentic Italian dishes.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Pasta
programme.desc: Visit restaurants that are turning out pasta dishes like nothing you've tasted before. Cacao tajarin in San Francisco; plum gnocchii in Boulder; and unique pastas in New York and Seattle.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Wine Country Weekend
programme.desc: Excite your palate with a gastronomical weekend in California wine country. Indulge in fried chicken at the more casual sister restaurant of a local legend, twirl your fork through unique pasta dishes, make room for amazing Mexican fare done right.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Modern Italian
programme.desc: Parm in New York City's Little Italy dishes out classic Italian-American sandwiches and bring out the kid in all of us.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Low Country Love
programme.desc: If you are looking for some Low Country Love in the form of a sweet treat, look no further than Charleston, South Carolina. At Callie's Hot Little Biscuit, they are baking up, over the top, warm doughy rounds like the Cinnamon Biscuit.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Nod to Nostalgia
programme.desc: An insider's peek into innovative eateries across America that are creating the most unique and exciting desserts today.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Tour Of Queens
programme.desc: We venture out of New York City to the incredibly diverse borough of Queens and find one of a kind baked treats. Rudy's Bakery and CafT has been putting their own spin on classics like the German Chocolate Cake since 1934.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Bay Area Bites
programme.desc: An insider's peek into innovative eateries across America that are creating the most unique and exciting desserts today.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Dark Fairytale Cake
programme.desc: Rosie wows her former Army Air Corps colleagues with a gravity-defying helicopter cake to mark a big anniversary and Suzanne creates a colorful world with her exotic bird cake.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Cake Fit for the Queen
programme.desc: Extreme cake maker Michelle Wibowo creates a five-foot edible Wizard of Oz mural out of delicious vanilla cake, painted icing and sweets for one lucky little birthday girl.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes: Misfortune Teller
programme.desc: Three teams of bakers create mystical fortune teller cakes, but in this big top of horrors, the crystal ball only reveals tragedy and disaster.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes: Snake Charmer Showdown
programme.desc: Nothing is ever normal in the sideshow tent, so Vivian Chan and Zac Young challenge the three teams of bakers to imagine a dangerous snake charming gone wrong.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Bollywood Bake-Off
programme.desc: East will meet West when four gifted cupcake makers compete for the chance to have their cupcakes at the center of the opening night party for the Indian Film Festival taking place in the heart of Hollywood.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: AFI Young Hollywood
programme.desc: Four gifted cupcake baker's battle for the chance to rub elbows with some of the hottest stars of the silver screen.

programme.desc: Mavis is determined to break out of lockdown on Halloween.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Brain Drain/ Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia snags Pandora's Box from Mavis and asks Zombie Isaac Newton to figure out how to open it. Unfortunately, a brain swap between him and Hank creates bigger problems. When Medusa comes to Hotel Transylvania, Aunt Lydia's hair acts up.

programme.title: Movie: Cars
programme.desc: A cocky young race car burns rubber to California to compete in the Piston Cup Championship, until the residents of Radiator Springs teach him to slow his roll and appreciate friends and family.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Ku'u Lei Melody
Toy Story of TERROR!
programme.desc: A fun road trip leads the gang to a roadside motel where, after one of the toys goes missing, the rest of the toys must work together to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Scared Shrekless
programme.desc: When Halloween arrives, Shrek cannot wait to start celebrating his favourite holiday. Instead of the usual tricks and treats, Shrek challenges the fairy-tale characters to a storytelling contest in the haunted castle.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens: Mutant Pumpkins From Outer Space
programme.desc: The Monsters are working as special ops and are dispatched to Modesto, Calif. An alien presence is detected, but when the team arrives, everything appears normal. When Halloween arrives, the jack-o-lanterns turn into aliens and try to take over the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Night of the Living Pharmacists
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' accidentally turns the citizens of Danville into contagious Doof-zombies who run rampant all over town. Agent P and the kids must work together to save Danville and avoid becoming Doof-zombies themselves.

programme.title: The Greatest: Voices

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Seven: 2000-2009
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: Find out what it means to be 'Mississippi Made,' go inside the classroom with Derrick Nix and watch the Rebels battle it out with the top team from the SEC East.

programme.title: Supernatural: The Man Who Would Be King

programme.title: Supernatural: Let It Bleed

programme.title: Movie: B.A.P.S

programme.title: The Closer: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Captain Raydor accompanies Brenda on an investigation involving the disappearance of a nanny working for close friends of the mayor. They discover that what they may have on their hands is a serial rapist armed with a stun gun.

programme.title: The Closer: In Custody
programme.desc: While investigating a suspicious suicide, the squad wades into a nasty child-custody dispute between a dying man and his meth-addicted ex-wife. Meanwhile, Pope applies for the police chief job.

programme.title: Movie: A Snow Globe Christmas
programme.desc: A cynical woman looks into the perfect world of a snow globe and rants how movies she produces fall short to real life. Smashing the globe she hits herself and wakes up in a perfect snow covered town. Trying to return home, she begins to find happiness.

programme.title: Movie: All I Want for Christmas

programme.title: Movie: A Very Nutty Christmas
programme.desc: Overworked bakery owner is already overwhelmed when her boyfriend sudden breaks up with her, she finds her Christmas spirit when a handsome solider appears.

programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Natalie Wood

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Natalie Wood
programme.desc: How could leading lady Natalie Wood disappear from a boat in the middle of the night without anyone on board noticing?

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Deadly Bite
programme.desc: High school volleyball player Jeanna Giese complains that she’s fatigued and has numbness in her arm.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.
