programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Mail/ Pups Save a Frog Mayor
programme.desc: The postman's truck gets stuck in the mud, and the mail gets stuck in a tree. Mayor Goodway turns into a frog.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Haunted House Party
programme.desc: Boo! The Bubble Guppies are invited to a costume party at a haunted house! Molly's going as a witch, Nonny's a vampire and Goby's a werewolf, but who's that in the spooky ghost costume? Could it be a real ghost?

programme.title: Abby Hatcher: The Fuzzlies Talent Show/ Princess Flug's Flower Float
programme.desc: Teeny Terry thinks he doesn't have a talent, so Abby helps him find one for the big Hotel Talent Show. Abby follows a trail of missing roses to a new Fuzzly - the flower-loving Princess Flug.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Cuckoo Clock/Pups Save Ms. Marjorie's House
programme.desc: Chickaletta's stuck inside Jake's family cuckoo clock as it slides down the mountainside. Ms. Marjorie has mysterious holes appearing all over her yard.

programme.title: Ricky Zoom: Problem at Windshield Point/ Two Wheel Justice
programme.desc: Scootio's iPad stops working so Ricky, Loop and DJ ride to the top of Windshield Point to help her.The Buddies go on a bike-along with Officer Bunker.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups and the Ghost Pirate
programme.desc: Capt'n Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a town party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea captained by a 'ghost,' Ryder and the Paw Patrol must save the ship and discover the ghost.

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate: Ryan's Spooky Playdate
programme.desc: It's monster mayhem and Ryan and his friends need to help him figure out what he's going to wear for Halloween.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Raise the PAW Patroller/ Pups Save the Crows
programme.desc: The Pups are able to raise their rig after Danny sinks the Paw Patroller. Ryder and the Pups pair up with Alex and his mini patrol to retrieve mysteriously missing items.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Truck or Treat

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Flying Food/ Pups Save a Ferris Wheel
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's delivery drones have gone out of control, and now they are air-dropping food everywhere. Mayor Humdinger steals Adventure Bay's Ferris Wheel.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Playful Dragon/ Pups Save the Critters
programme.desc: The pups need to save a playful dragon who's escaped; All of Francois' critters have gotten loose from his unhooked trailer.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon Says/ Sing Like a Canary
programme.desc: When Alvin accuses Simon of being too safe, Simon agrees to do whatever crazy thing Alvin wants him to do. A cute singing bird replaces Alvin in the band after Alvin makes too many demands as a performer.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ New Haunts

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Wind Whipped & Waterlogged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back
programme.desc: Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice controlled page turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized. And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Correy Bell makes tumbling down the stairs look sexy, and Dave Helem has a message for substitute teachers. Plus, Pretty Ricki puts the 'C'' in crazy' and Dave Temple has a church experience he'll never forget.

programme.desc: Comedian Rita Brent reveals her number one tip for going number two at work, Kyle Erby thinks black folks should stick together, sometimes, and Vanessa Fraction gets an early sex-ed lesson. Plus, Owen Smith moves to LA to ditch a clinger.

programme.desc: Funny woman Gina Brillon has a run in with an old foe, Mike Troy and his mom meet their match in the school yard, and Billy Sorrells receives some haunting text messages. Plus, Pretty Ricki learns about the joys of bacon.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Does Hip-Hop Reject Women?
programme.desc: The history of hip hop has often been told through the eyes of the men who dominate the charts. But badass female rappers have been battling for equality since the beginning.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Signs Point to North
programme.desc: Kim needs to deliver earlier than planned, Kris prepares the house for her new granddaughter's arrival, Brody gives Bruce advice on a new friendship, and Khloe tries to make peace with what's happening in her life.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Loving and Letting Go
programme.desc: Kris and Bruce have major decisions to make concerning their future together. Meanwhile, Khloe continues to deal with her changing relationship with Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: How to Deal
programme.desc: Khloé is hurt by an interview which contains negative comments about her and her family. Kris gets Jonathan to sneak away from Kim for a trip to Sonoma. Scott takes up karate to satisfy his couples therapy homework.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: And All That Jazzzzzzz
programme.desc: Khloé doesn’t feel comfortable in her house so Rob invites her to move in with him. Kris gets bitten by the Broadway bug and starts taking singing and dancing lessons and Kourtney sneaks to Las Vegas to catch Scott in a lie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 1
programme.desc: The family hears about a surprise Kanye is planning for Kim's birthday. Kris goes into panic mode when she learns Kim's house is delayed and Kourtney and Khloé plot revenge on judgmental Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 2
programme.desc: The family gathers in San Francisco to surprise Kim on her birthday but the real surprise is Kanye proposing to Kim. Meanwhile, Scott heads to New York to spend time with his father and sick mother.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Two Birthdays and a Yard Sale
programme.desc: Kourtney attempts to organize a family yard sale. Kendall prepares for her 18th birthday and makes plans to move out of the house, while Bruce tries to pretend his upcoming birthday is no big deal.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Does Hip-Hop Reject Women?

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Science Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Three remaining teams must capture the moment when a mad scientist's creation goes wrong.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Zombie Wedding
programme.desc: Two teams tackle a zombie-wedding theme to determine the big winner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Carnival Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four carnival food-loving chefs to play carnival classics, Grocery Games-style. First, he turns a popular strength test game into a finesse challenge to determine which ingredient the chefs must feature in their classic carnival treat.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Flavortown Fright Night
programme.desc: Things are getting freaky in Flavortown as four fearless chefs play Guy Fieri's scariest games for a stab at a $20,000 shopping spree. First, Guy gives the chefs a frightening ingredient that they must feature in a spicy dish.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Gumball catches Darwin gazing wistfully at a photo of Teri on Elmore Plus and secretly enlists Carrie to help bring them together.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Wish
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin believe they’ve turned Miss Simian into a neck-cushion.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Box
programme.desc: The Wattersons receive an unmarked package in the mail. To distract themselves from the urge to open it they all take turns to imagine what it might contain.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Factory
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin save the day at the Rainbow Factory.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Console
programme.desc: Elmore becomes trapped inside a fantasy RPG world when Gumball is given a cursed videogame console. Gumball, Darwin and Anais have to battle their way through town, unraveling the secrets of their new virtual reality and leveling up to defeat the Boss.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Agent
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin’s clothes go missing after a swimming lesson, and Gumball is forced to wear a tuxedo from the lost and found office. He believes it makes him look like a certain dapper British secret agent.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Ollie
programme.desc: When Darwin asks Gumball to teach him how to skate, Gumball makes sure he covers every aspect of the skating lifestyle from wearing the right gear, using the right terms and choosing the right board.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Web
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin give Nicole a crash course in computers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Catfish
programme.desc: Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, so Gumball and Darwin, feeling bad, create one called Muriel. Granny Jojo finds out that Louie has been spending time online with 'another woman' and sets out to destroy her, despite her not being real.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Mess
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin baby-sit, then baby-lose, Penny’s little sister.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Cycle
programme.desc: Gumball, Darwin and Anais find out that Mr. Wilson has been bullying their dad most of his life. The kids try to help their dad and ultimately seek revenge against Mr. Wilson.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Heart
programme.desc: Mr. Robinson tries and repeatedly fails to win back Gumball and Darwin’s friendship.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Crowbar Jones: Origins
programme.desc: Grizz screens an epic amateur movie he just made for a focus group, but people start leaving.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Hot Sauce
programme.desc: A quest for their favorite hot sauce causes the Bears to get involved with a sting operation.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Pizza Band
programme.desc: The Bears get pizza at Papa Bear’s Pizza Cave and wind up replacing the place’s animatronic band. They’re such a hit that they go on tour!

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Braces
programme.desc: When the Bears go to the dentist, Panda gets braces.

programme.title: American Dad!: Funnyish Games
programme.desc: Francine becomes obsessed with home security after a break-in rattles her. Steve tries on Hayley's laidback approach to school work.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Cook, the Steve, the Gayle and Her Lover
programme.desc: When Bob throws a dinner party to bond with his new friend, Gayle uses the opportunity to introduce the family to her new love interest. Little does she know, Louise has a long-standing feud with Gayle's boyfriend.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Sexy Dance Healing
programme.desc: After Bob slips on the sidewalk, he is forced to take legal action in order to pay for surgery. In a turn of events, Bob finds himself under the care of Jairo, who promises to help him heal without a doctor.

programme.title: Family Guy: Papa Has a Rollin' Son
programme.desc: For Father's Day, the guys track down Joe's estranged father. But when Joe explains that his dad is intolerant of people with disabilities, Peter steps in and pretends to be Joe. Meanwhile, Stewie's doctor tells him that he'll only grow to be 5’1”.

programme.title: Family Guy: Guy Robot
programme.desc: Stewie doesn't like Brian's standup comedy jokes, so the two of them fight. To get back at Brian and make him jealous, Stewie builds a robot friend. But when the robot outsmarts Stewie and dumps him, Brian and Stewie reunite.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Divine Rescue

programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibals in the Ghost City
programme.desc: An abandoned city in the African jungle might have a bloody past of malevolent spirits and cannibals. Mount Vesuvius shows signs that it's awakening, and the mafia could be to blame. Experts investigate Hitler's secret Nazi UFO program.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Treasure of the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Strange spots near the Grand Canyon may hold clues to the legendary treasure of a notorious bandit. Satellite images could explain desert ruins rumored to be an entrance to an underworld. A city-size chunk of ice suddenly disappears in Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Blood for the Snake God
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Curse of the Vampire
Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Demons of the Devil
programme.desc: The latest science reveals that demons aren't just the stuff of horror stories, and as experts investigate shocking new archaeological evidence, they uncover the gruesome methods used to exorcise humans of demonic possessions.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Hunting the Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the Loch Ness Monster, and experts investigate the world's most mysterious waters in search of evidence that a prehistoric monster could still be lurking in the deep.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Call of the Werewolf
programme.desc: New evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame for the werewolf, and people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Devil on One Shoulder
programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chinatown Takedown
programme.desc: An immigrant accused of viciously murdering his own family may be hiding out in Manhattan's Chinatown neighbourhood.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Houdini
programme.desc: Newark police catch a suspect red-handed, but back at the precinct, the suspect escapes from the interrogation room. After 'Houdini' eludes several attempts to capture him over the next two months, the Fugitive Task Force takes over.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Just One Step Behind
programme.desc: Detectives scour the streets to find people who are willing to provide information on a fugitive's whereabouts.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Moving Target
programme.desc: Deputy Mendez and the Fugitive Task Force search for a career criminal before another victim is robbed, assaulted, or worse.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Couple on the Run
programme.desc: After a drug deal goes wrong, a man is shot and collapses behind a dumpster, ending up on life support. A couple are wanted in connection to this attempted murder.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Gun Store Heist
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: On the Stroll
programme.desc: Task Force is looking for a woman promoting prostitution of young children.

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: American Justice: Who Killed the Candy Heiress?: The Helen Brach Story
programme.desc: The strange case of candy heiress Helen Brach, who disappeared without a trace in 1977.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Animal Instinct
programme.desc: Two officers are helped by the K9 Unit to corral a suspect who takes off running after a car chase. Rush and Rutledge struggle to convince a man with heart problems to go to the hospital. A car careens off a bridge and the driver can't be found.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Always Remain Calm
programme.desc: Tampa first responders have a chaotic night treating seizure and overdose patients; the ROC Squad Task Force tracks down suspected armed robbers in a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: When Dallas patrol officers respond to a disturbance call, they find an armed parole violator intent on not returning to jail. The suspect fires at police and barricades himself in a bathroom. A SWAT negotiator is called in to talk the man out safely.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lockdown
programme.desc: When a crazed gunman terrorizes his neighborhood, officers put themselves in the line of fire to restore order. Then A man discovers his elderly father has been stabbed in the back. The knife itself turns out to be Lt. Joe Kenda's biggest clue.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A community is shocked when Antoine McKenzie is brazenly shot outside an auto parts store in broad daylight. But when no witnesses can identify the killer, the only lead left for Lt. Joe Kenda is a final message written in the victim's own blood.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Case that Haunts Me
programme.desc: A woman is found in the mountains, naked and covered in blood. As Det. Joe Kenda digs into who she is and what happened to her, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: In October 2016, after helping a friend fix his computer, 18-year-old tech prodigy, Sam Poss, takes off on foot and never returns home. Did the beloved teen run away? Was there an accident? Police work around the clock to find the truth.

programme.title: American Monster: An Open Relationship
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: American Monster: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: American Monster: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life - as these never-before-aired home videos attest. But blind greed would bring about the destruction of this loving family.

programme.title: American Monster: An Open Relationship
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: American Monster: Thin Ice

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: In October 2016, after helping a friend fix his computer, 18-year-old tech prodigy, Sam Poss, takes off on foot and never returns home. Did the beloved teen run away? Was there an accident? Police work around the clock to find the truth.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Horror I Don't Remember
programme.desc: Sherry Shafer never had a good relationship with her younger brother, Brian Britton, but she never expected to lose everything because of him. Today, all she has left is the fear that one day he will return to finish what he started 26 years ago.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Prophet
programme.desc: To Kevin Currie, Mormon prophet Jeffrey Lundgren was more than a spiritual leader, he was a brother. But before long, Kevin realized that this Man of God was really a devil in disguise with an evil plan.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secret
programme.desc: Danyall White tells the gripping true story of her brother Richard. Danyall always thought he was a prankster who told stories. But when his stories started getting more and more violent, she slowly realized that her brother was hiding a monstrous secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Home Sweet Nightmare
programme.desc: Sheila Janutolo dreaded being alone with her husband Jim Cruz. Over the years, she had learned to fear him and his violent temper. But when she got a call that he'd been arrested for a ghastly crime, she was certain police had the wrong man.

programme.title: Dateline NBC: Mystery in Rock Hill
programme.desc: Billy Wayne Cope, a devoted father and husband, is charged in the brutal murder of his 12-year old daughter, Amanda. After giving four mis-matched confessions, his case seemed all but lost, until DNA evidence points directly to someone else.

programme.title: Dateline NBC: Mystery in Rock Hill
programme.desc: Billy Wayne Cope, a devoted father and husband, is charged in the brutal murder of his 12-year old daughter, Amanda. After giving four mis-matched confessions, his case seemed all but lost, until DNA evidence points directly to someone else.

programme.title: Dateline: The Phony Rockefeller
programme.desc: He was a high society hustler with a flair for spinning lies. But was this charming con-man capable of murder? To solve the mystery, cold case detectives began to retrace his steps along a decades-old trail of deceit.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets of the Snake River
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young mother leads to a massive search across the Pacific Northwest. With an estranged husband, ex-boyfriend and a suspicious neighbour all in the picture, authorities believe there are a few potential suspects.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: It's love at first sight for 19-year-old Ashleigh Lindsey when she is introduced to Josh Mahaffey by his roommate Scott. But when she decides to move in with her new man, it soon becomes clear there's not room for all three of them under one roof.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Devil Went Down to Georgia
programme.desc: After a recent encounter with a peeping tom outside his daughter's bedroom window and another with a masked man in his own hallway, Jerry Glaser thinks someone is trying to kill him and takes his life into his own hands to protect himself and his family.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Murder House
programme.desc: Westfield, New Jersey, an affluent suburb just outside the bustle of New York City, is home to picture-perfect homes and families alike. In 1971, in the grand home of John List and his family, a true monster hides behind the stately façade.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Secret Rage
programme.desc: For 17-year-old Sarah Wisnosky, college is all about new experiences. So when she catches the eye of a flirty frat boy, she's happy to play along. But soon, she discovers he's hiding a dark secret. Can Sarah break things off before it's too late?

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Murders
programme.desc: Pennsylvania native Janet Lynn Mickey's greatest dream is to start her own family. So, when she marries college football-star Darrell Tyburski her future seems secure. But when the young couple has children, they are led down the darkest path.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General Hideki Tojo is a cold-blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Saddam Hussein: Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: A profile of the Iraqi leader, despised in the West but a hero to many in the Middle East.

programme.title: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama Bin Laden's journey unfolds; from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent terror against the West, resulting in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond: Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Saddam Hussein: Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: A profile of the Iraqi leader, despised in the West but a hero to many in the Middle East.

programme.title: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama Bin Laden's journey unfolds; from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent terror against the West, resulting in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond: Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General Hideki Tojo is a cold-blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A New World of Challenges
programme.desc: Three news teams begin their projects and rookie builders Matt and Amy Hill quickly realize building in snow is more complicated than they planned. Mike and Dan Owens mill their own lumber while Jackie hires professionals to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Snowball Effect
programme.desc: At Jackie's slippery build site, the team works to finish the subfloor and start raising walls, but rain and mud hinder them at every step. Meanwhile, the Hills are forced to dig their supplies out of three feet of snow.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Family Is a Good Thing
programme.desc: The Hills race to finish installing their floor to avoid a delivery delay, which leads to an on-site injury. Meanwhile, Jackie and her team run into problems when their build materials start to fall apart.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game Changer
programme.desc: Jeff struggles with his front deck. Chappie's team finds a major error while building the exterior insulation and Chris Sewell runs out of building materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Toy Set For Big Kids
programme.desc: Chris gets some much needed help from family to work on his interior. A floatplane with engine problems brings Chappie's build site to a standstill and Jeff makes a critical error while building the water tank system for his cabin.

programme.title: Paid Program

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Bright Lake House
programme.desc: Brock and Chase are giving a lake house some much needed updates. They get rid of the rubber flooring, carpet and dated accordion door. Brock creates a one of a kind artwork, made of barnwood. He adds sliding barn doors to give the home some rustic charm.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Hunting For the Next VIP
programme.desc: Vanilla Ice and his number one ninja, Wes search Palm Beach, Florida for their next big project. They check out 4 unique properties from an oceanside mansion to a sprawling ranch, hoping to find a diamond in the rough.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Views From the Great Room
programme.desc: The main entrance of the house opens into the Great Room, making this space very important to Rob since he wants to wow all the visitors. He opens the space up and extends it to the water.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Suite Dreams
programme.desc: Rob and his ninjas transform the master bedroom into a massive room fit for a king. Elegant hardwood floors, wallpaper, a custom fireplace and floor to ceiling windows will prove challenging to install, but worth the work.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Infinity and Beyond
programme.desc: The pool at Rob's latest project leaves much to be desired, it's small, enclosed and boring, which is a huge mistake on this lake front property because it obscures the beautiful view. Rob rips off the enclosure and gets to work.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Kicking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: The kitchen and dining room at Rob's latest lakeside retreat are bland, boring and plain. Rob wants to have an open floor plan in his kitchen, so he knocks out several walls to bring it up to date.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: From Virtual to Reality
programme.desc: Technology and style go toe-to-toe when the ninjas tackle the spare rooms and game room. White walls disappear as an underwater mural takes shape and marine windows are installed.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Temple of Renovation
programme.desc: The ninjas embrace their inner children when it comes to the kids' bedrooms and play area. Outside, Rob imagines a play area fit for an adventurer with a giant temple, airplane treehouse, splash pad and fountain.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Strike Zone
programme.desc: Rob has big plans to turn the upstairs area into a gamer's paradise, complete with a custom bowling alley, gaming station, bar and private entrance.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A VIP Main Attraction
programme.desc: The family room receives star treatment when the ninjas go all out to renovate the outdated space. Rob adds a home theater system, sliding glass doors and plenty of ice to make this one spectacular space the entire family can enjoy.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Docks and Crocs
programme.desc: The backyard is a hot mess, but Rob has plans to turn the outdoor space into a calm and cool oasis. The ninjas dig out a lounge area and install an ice bar. Things get wild when Wes catches a gator.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Bringing Down the Roof
programme.desc: Bad weather wreaks havoc as Rob and the ninjas install a new roof over the addition and revamp the exterior of the house. Strong winds and heavy rain lead to a close call, but the ninjas hold tight and face the elements head on.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Taking the Heat to the Street
programme.desc: Things heat up when Rob and the ninjas turn the boring, outdated garage into a modern and colorful space complete with solar panels and a solar water heater to power the entire house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging Rose's Cabin From the Woods
programme.desc: Mark and the guys have to build their own road to reach a cabin that has been overgrown for 11 years! Rose never got to finish her dream cabin, but Mark will make sure it gets a new life.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Victory Lap
programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Double Pen Log Vacation Rental
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work with one of their most passionate and knowledgeable clients yet. Karen Tillary is building a vacation rental and Mark is in charge of the log addition.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Castle in Cave Spring, GA
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn one of the biggest barns they've ever saved into an even bigger home. They work through sweltering heat to transform this Ohio double-pen barn. Mark visits a small log cabin with a lot of charm and gets a look at the dog trot.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Twin Cities
programme.desc: Walleye, bundt cake, and the Jucy Lucy are on tap for Andrew in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Memphis
programme.desc: Andrew uncovers the edible icons of Memphis from BBQ ribs to the Elvis sandwich.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Off-the-chain Eats
programme.desc: From a 14-pound mountain of nachos and a barbecue a sandwich as mighty as the Mississippi to a two-pork punch of a breakfast burrito, these citywide franchises have gone off the chain.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Sandwich Heroes
programme.desc: From fried bologna made fancy to bright lobster on pitch-black bread, these mild-mannered hometown standards go beyond the same-old-same-old and earning their bragging rights as sandwich heroes.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: The New South

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: It's All About Auburn
programme.desc: Rutledge Wood and Damaris Philips visit Auburn, Alabama, known for its cuisine that uses classic Southern ingredients in inventive ways.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Celebratory Food Traditions

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southern Comfort Brunch

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: French-American Brunch

programme.desc: During Halloween, Fozzie can't help but be funny when he's supposed to be spooky! When Kermit won't try Miss Nanny's boo-berry pancakes, Summer tells a mysterious Halloween tale.

programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Land of the Rising Pup / ARF-CHOO

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet

programme.desc: After being inadvertently zapped by a 'gigantinator' ray, Phineas and Ferb's chameleon grows to the size of a dinosaur. Candace and Stacy are upset because Stacy's mom does not think they are responsible enough to go to a concert on their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Turbo Clash! Showdown at the Dark Citadel!
programme.desc: It’s time for Valt to prove once and for all who belongs in the top spot as he clashes with Hyde in a Dread Tower showdown. Frustrated by his earlier loss to Hyde, Aiger storms out of the match and runs into Phi.

programme.desc: Comedian John Oliver offers his satirical take on news, current events and politics.

programme.title: Watchmen
programme.desc: Conflicted, damaged superheroes navigate a dystopian future.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: After a year of dating, an American woman accompanies her boyfriend to Asia to attend his cousin's wedding, and discovers that his family is incredibly rich. She finds it difficult to be accepted, especially by his domineering and controlling mother.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Times at the El Royale
programme.desc: In 1969 several stranges have a chance meeting at Lake Tahoe's El Royale, each of them holding on to a dark past. Over the course of the night, their secrets meet and unravel, sending them all into chaos.

programme.title: Movie: Evening
programme.desc: Two daughters gather at their mother's deathbed, only to discover that their mother lived another life long ago. With this understanding of her, they face their loss and struggle for happiness.

programme.title: Movie: Out Cold
programme.desc: Snowboarders team up with a tycoon's daughters to save their favourite snowboard run.

programme.title: Movie: A Walk in the Clouds
programme.desc: A disillusioned Second World War soldier gallantly offers to help an unwed pregnant girl.

programme.title: Movie: Bounce
programme.desc: An ad executive survives a plane crash when he gives up his flight to another man. He begins to fall for the man's widow, though she has no idea of his connection to her late husband.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian John Oliver offers his satirical take on news, current events and politics.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Marwen
programme.desc: After a horrific attack leaves him broken and with no memories, Mark Hogancamp copes with his painful and confusing life by building a miniature replica of a World War II village, complete with resident dolls that resemble himself and his friends.

programme.title: Movie: Brothers
programme.desc: A young man comforts his sister-in-law and nieces after the military informs them that his older brother is missing in action.

programme.title: Movie: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: A family man and snowplow driver is named his small town's citizen of the year for his lifetime of service to the snowy community, but his euphoria is shattered when his son turns up dead, transforming the father into a killer out for revenge.

programme.title: Movie: I, Robot
programme.desc: In 2035, robots that have been programmed to never hurt humans have become part of the daily lives of people. When the main suspect in the murder of a scientist is a robot, a robot-hating detective begins to wonder if humans are actually safe.

programme.title: Movie: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: A former executive uncovers the dark secret behind the seemingly perfect town of Stepford.

programme.title: Movie: Me, Myself and Irene
programme.desc: A police officer's split personalities vie for a woman who is in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Movie: Brüno
programme.desc: After disgracing himself, a fashion guru must leave Austria. He departs for Los Angeles in hopes of finding worldwide fame.

programme.title: Movie: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: A secluded weekend turns deadly for five friends who become infected with a flesh-eating virus.

programme.title: Movie: Cabin Fever 2: Spring Fever
programme.desc: Paul tries to warn high school students at their prom of a deadly virus contained in their water bottles.

programme.title: Movie: Arachnophobia
programme.desc: Deadly spiders from South America terrorize the residents of a small California town.

programme.title: Movie: The Invisible
programme.desc: When a teenager is severely beaten, he floats in purgatory, unable to return to his dying body. He soon realizes that the person who attacked him may be the only one who can save him.

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: A harmless game of truth or dare between young friends takes a deadly turn when something starts killing those who refuse to answer truthfully or to follow through on a dare. One of its players tries to figure out how to end the game before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: Working Girl
programme.desc: A Wall Street secretary assumes her conniving boss' persona when she gets injured on a skiing holiday.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: HBO First Look: Jojo Rabbit

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders

programme.title: River Of No Return: Bearing Down on the Ranch
programme.desc: A predatory bear stalks a homestead forcing the rancher to aggressively protect himself and his cattle. A jetboat engine failure in the river rapids puts Buck's operation in jeopardy. A violent storm forces bush pilots to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Rapid Response
programme.desc: When a rafter goes overboard, a legendary jetboat captain springs into action to save the man before the river's rapids claim another victim. Heavy rains threaten to destroy Aubrey's ranch. She calls in air support to help save her barn.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Vanished Confederate Treasure
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer head to Virginia in search of the long-lost Confederacy treasury. The brothers trek through the unforgiving terrain of the Appalachian Mountains in hopes of putting the 150-year-old mystery to rest.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: The Curse of El Dorado
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer are on the road to El Dorado. Using clues left behind by legendary explorer Percy Fawcett, the brothers head deep into the Amazon jungle to find key landmarks that could lead them to the lost City of Gold.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer trek into the heart of Alaska to recover a plane that disappeared while carrying two American politicians. The brothers battle the elements and conquer glaciers as they attempt to solve the 47-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Brendon and McKenna
programme.desc: Brendon loves McKenna, but failed attempts to connect has left him wondering if McKenna is for real. Nev teams with social media sensation Karrueche Tran to help Brandon uncover the shocking truth of his true love.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Larissa and Anthony
programme.desc: After being catfished by her high school best friend, Larissa turn to her online friend Anthony for support. Feelings between them grew to love, but after a few false moves on Anthony's part, Larissa is worried he too is lying.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Infiniti and Dave
programme.desc: 19-year-old dancer Infiniti wants Nev and Max to help her find out if her online love is real. What the pair uncover is far shadier than either of them had ever imagined.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Andrea, Alex and Andrea
programme.desc: Fans of popular YouTube star, Andrea Russett, summon Nev and Max to help catch a potential stalker who is impersonating Andrea's family online. The guys soon uncover a web of fake profiles much larger than they thought possible.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antwane and Tony
programme.desc: Carmen is concerned about her cousin Antwane's three-year romance with a man named Tony. Antwane lives a virtually pre-digital age existence making Tony's true identity difficult to reveal.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kaden and Adriana
programme.desc: Nev and co-host Kamie Crawford help lovestruck Kaden figure out if his four-year relationship with sexy Adriana is real. What's crazy is Kaden actually met Adriana IRL.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Resee and Brendan
programme.desc: Resee's one shining glimmer of happiness in conservative, small town Illinois was his bestie, Brendan. But when Brendan up and moved to San Francisco, he fully ghosted Resee.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Ross and Jordan
programme.desc: As an aspiring stand-up comedian in Brooklyn, NY, Ross couldn't believe his luck when he started dating the girl of his dreams, Jordan. Unfortunately four months ago, the love of his life ghosted him.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Kayla and Shawn
programme.desc: When Kayla swiped right on Shawn, she felt she'd hit the jackpot: tall, handsome, and devilishly charming. After a few months of dating, Kayla was ready to make things official, until he ghosted for good.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Giovanna and Dante
programme.desc: Giovanna immigrated from Spain to the U.S. two years ago and met the love of her life in Dante. But nine months ago, Dante ghosted her without any explanation.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Michael and Chanelle
programme.desc: Michael felt he had no time for a relationship, but love appeared in a DM. Chanelle is the light he's needed in his life, but out of the blue she's disappeared, leaving only Nev and Max to help him find his missing love.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick and Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa have been communicating daily for years, but have never met. Before Nick heads to college, he wants to go meet Melissa, and find out if she's the person he thinks she is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Open Investigation
programme.desc: Nev and Max embark on the biggest case of their lives as they track down the infamous Shelly Chartier to uncover new truths as they investigate the celebrity catfishing of Paris Roxanne and NBA star Chris 'Birdman' Andersen.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Felicia
programme.desc: Young couples take their online-only romantic relationships offline and meet in person.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: The most up-to-date trading news, broadcasted straight from the NASDAQ studio.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Viewers will be taken into the mind of one of Wall Street's most respected money managers.

programme.title: American Greed: The Fugitives: The Contractor From Hell/ The Check's in the Mail
programme.desc: Contractor Craig Oliver uses a fraudulent business licence to scam Virginia and Maryland homeowners out of more than $2.5 million. Odowa Roland Okuomose is wanted for his alleged involvement in a lottery scheme where he is the only winner.

programme.title: American Greed: The Fugitives: Bank Robbing Babe/ The Vanishing Internet Millionaire
programme.desc: A fraud ring based in Sacramento orchestrates an elaborate scam to rob banks across the country. James Eberhart allegedly defrauds investors in a telemarketing scheme that promises big returns, but his 800 victims never see any profits.

programme.title: American Greed: The Fugitives: Gone in the Gulf/ The Anti-Social Network
programme.desc: Aubrey Lee Price is accused of stealing $40 million from investors. Feeling the heat, he gets on a boat in Key West and is never seen again. Then, a trio of geeks allegedly bilked internet porn users spend over $160 million on phony anti-virus software.

programme.title: American Greed: The Fugitives: From Russia With Lies
programme.desc: The Wolfs stand accused of conducting a fraudulent investment scheme from 2004 – 2006, luring Americans and Russian immigrants to invest in real estate with false promises of high rates of return.

programme.title: American Greed: The Fugitives: Hard-Rocking Fraudster/ Refi's in Ruin
programme.desc: A concert promoter flees when the SEC accuses him of running a $300 million investment fraud. A serial financial predator runs an $11 million loan scam in a nationwide rip off.

programme.title: American Greed: The Fugitives: Diamonds Aren't Forever/ Cover Your Assets
programme.desc: A financier and real estate developer with a sterling reputation ends up in bankruptcy court. And, a CEO is charged with overseeing accounting fraud to inflate his company’s worth to investors while pocketing a fortune.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q take to the ice for a very slippery game. Then they head to the park to get support for some ridiculous causes, and tonight's loser is forced to relive the sins of his past before a captive, critical audience.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: The guys get sassy while posing as auto parts salesmen, then head to the mall where they try to reel in unsuspecting shoppers. Tonight's big loser is stuck in a horrible mess after being locked inside a rigged bathroom of horrors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball
programme.desc: At a ski shop, Michael demonstrates the latest in winter gear: a hat that also makes hot coco. And later, when taking inventory at an abandoned garage, Michael stuns his co-worker when a ghostly violin strikes a chord, all by itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud First Look
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Dating

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Comical Escapades

programme.desc: A NYC couple looks to escape the hustle and bustle of the city and purchases a fixer-upper only a short ferry ride away on the Jersey Shore. But once renovations begin, they discover so many problems that they wonder if they might be in over their heads.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan take their chances on a split-level home that is full of disasters. Faced with numerous setbacks, they must put their differences aside to turn the nightmare into a dream home for potential buyers.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Wabannsia Made Wonderful
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan take a huge risk when they buy an oddball, boxlike house from the 90s. A flooded basement is just the beginning of the problems they encounter, so Alison must find a way to bring big design to a house that's hurtling over budget.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Skyline Penthouse
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan take on a penthouse with the potential for some serious profit. However, what seems like an easy renovation quickly goes off the rails when an inexperienced superintendent tries to hide his shoddy work.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Historic Pain or Economic Gain?
programme.desc: Alison Victoria and contractor Donovan Eckhardt tackle an 1800s landmarked home in Chicago's Wicker Park neighborhood.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Retiring to the Country
programme.desc: With two grown kids out of the house, John and Stephanie Eberle agree it's time to downsize and look for the perfect place to relax as they enter retirement. Chip and Joanna take them on a tour of vastly different homes.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Missionaries Enlist Kids to Find Retreat in Their Hometown of Waco, Texas
programme.desc: Dr. Tim McCall and his wife Janice run an orphanage in Uganda, living almost year-round in a 160-square-foot home. They're entrusting their kids to find them a comfortable refuge for their biannual visits to Waco.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Searching for a New Homebuilder's Dream Home in an Old Neighborhood
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take Genny and Russ Davis on a tour through three homes in Woodway, Texas. Woodway is considered 'upper-crust', an established neighborhood with older homes, large trees and massive yards.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Young Family Hopes for Fixer in Older Neighborhood
programme.desc: Kimberly and Blake Batson are first time homebuyers looking for a fixer in Western Hills, Texas to settle down in.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Couple Seeks a Unique Fixer
programme.desc: Jill and Josh are looking for a house that will accommodate Josh's four kids and the couple's new baby on the way.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Hazel and House of Sacrifice
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose after a couple takes in a troubled foster child. A family struggles to come to terms with the events that happened in their basement.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Feast/ The Girl Under the Bridge
programme.desc: A bachelorette party at a rustic cabin in the mountains goes horribly wrong. Also, a woman searches for the identity of her young son's elusive 'friend.'

programme.title: Paranormal Emergency: It Wanted to Feed

programme.title: Below Deck: Hex on the Beach

programme.title: Below Deck: Mojitos Mo' Problems

programme.title: Below Deck: You're Grounded

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The FBI
programme.desc: It is America's most powerful police force, made up of an elite team of Special Agents secretly patrolling the nation - and the world.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The White House
programme.desc: An inside look at the secret protocols, elite security and hidden history of the world's most public of private residences. But more guarded than the White House itself are its secrets.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Presidential Cover-Ups
programme.desc: This episode looks beyond the headlines to uncover the real stories behind the greatest White House scandals. Former presidential advisors, historians and journalists will reveal how much secrecy exists within the White House.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Scientology
programme.desc: As one of the most secret organizations in America, Scientology has more than 100,000 followers. Learn about the origins, doctrine, language, and celebrity allure of this wealthy and influential institution.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Pentagon
programme.desc: It is the epicenter of America's military operations. A five-sided fortress with a single purpose to defend the United States and its citizens.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: American Nazis
programme.desc: There are nearly 200 neo-Nazi groups in America, covertly monitored by the government. Past and present Nazi members, journalists, academics and law enforcement experts describe the U.S. secret Nazi past and the present day inner workings.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Drug Wars
programme.desc: This episode uncovers the conspiracies behind America's 40-year drug campaign. A congressman, DEA officers and hip-hop mogul speak out about this debate.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Fort Knox
programme.desc: Fort Knox is one of the most secure structures in the world and safeguards the vast wealth of the United States. We unlock the secret contents, political controversy, and cutting edge security hidden behind the gates of the world's most famous vault.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Secret Underground
programme.desc: Take a look at the tunnels, cities and fortresses covertly constructed beneath the feet of the American public, including Mt. Weather, an underground bunker used to house high-ranking officials and secret underground rail systems.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Monuments
programme.desc: Go behind the walls of the Washington Monument to reveal a series of secret symbols and codes, one which was put there by one of the world's most mysterious societies.

programme.title: Movie: The Stranger
programme.desc: An infamous, escaped Nazi lives a quiet life in Connecticut until a war crimes commissioner appears.

programme.title: Movie: The Devil and Daniel Webster
programme.desc: A farmer sells his soul to the devil and a politician tries argue his case.

programme.title: Movie: The Story of Louis Pasteur
programme.desc: A chronicle of 19th-century French scientist Louis Pasteur's achievements.

programme.title: Movie: The Life of Emile Zola
programme.desc: Emile Zola, a writer, risked his reputation to defend a Jewish man accused of treason.

programme.title: Movie: A Song to Remember
programme.desc: The famed composer Chopin sacrifices everything, even love, for his native Poland.

programme.title: Movie: Juarez
programme.desc: True story of Mexico's Abraham Lincoln and his fight against Napoleon's empire.

programme.title: Live Free or Die: The Tough Get Going

programme.title: Live Free or Die: Race Against Time

programme.title: Live Free or Die: To the Bone

programme.title: Live Free or Die: Bring It Home

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Storm's a-Mooin'
