programme.title: Untamed Philippines: Enchanted Islands
programme.desc: A nation of more than 100 million people on a collection of over 7,600 islands all set in the warm emerald seas of the Pacific Ocean, the Philippines is a land of sparkling wonder.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines: Wild Paradise
programme.desc: Moving from turtles of the Palawan coast to the unique National Marine Park at Tubbataha, to meet giants, whale sharks and manta rays. Also, meet a man who has done much to help the Philippine Tarsier.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Land of Dragons
programme.desc: Central Indonesia is a wild, volcanic world where life thrives and dragons rule.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Islands of Monsters
programme.desc: The western Indonesian islands of Borneo and Sumatra are home to rare species.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Papua's lost worlds support one of the richest concentrations of life on our planet.

programme.title: Predator Fail: The Hunting Game
programme.desc: There is no greater predatory testing ground than the African savannah. Its greatest hunters, the lion, Nile crocodile and cheetah, are at the top of the pile here. Predator hunts prey, predator wins.

programme.title: Predator Fail: Seek and Destroy
programme.desc: Follow some of the planets strangest hunters through their hunting trials and tribulations as they target and stalk prey.

programme.title: Predator Fail: Deep Water Death Match
programme.desc: Underwater, speed and strategy are key to making the kill. Ocean hunters have aced the aquatic hunting games, but, even for the top players, things don't always go according to plan.

programme.title: Predators in Paradise: Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Explore the ever-increasing instances of animal attacks as humans encroach on them.

programme.title: Predator in Paradise: In the Shallows
programme.desc: Predators fight for survival in tropical paradise.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: Giant magnetic bubbles millions of miles wide, bizarre invisible matter, and a death star tearing through bands of icy comets, flinging them into violent orbits. All this and more could be inside our cosmic backyard, and effecting our lives on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mysteries of the Killer Stars
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the deadly behaviours of the universe's most mysterious stars, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the strange breed of killer stars that are hurtling through space.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Stars That Kill
programme.desc: The universe is home to real-life Death Stars that could destroy planet Earth. The latest science reveals the terrifying secrets of NASA's six deadliest: vampire stars, supernovas that can vaporize a planet, and unpredictable stars gone rogue.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Interstellar Gold Rush
programme.desc: A distant planet shows evidence of an Earth-like atmosphere, while a mysterious glowing light suggests the impossible - an atmosphere on the Moon. Have we found evidence of a crashed alien ship on the asteroid belt and why are there blueberries on Mars?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Death Star
programme.desc: A mysterious object is orbiting Saturn, and it looks just like the Death Star. New evidence might shed new light on the mysterious death of Yuri Gagarin, the first man in space. When a cuting-edge satellite vanishes, fears of a space war escalate.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Planet Killer
programme.desc: A mission to Mars captures an image of a strange structure on the Red Planet. Files from the first Apollo mission record an eerie sighting on the dark side of the moon. A planet-eating star gives scientists a glimpse of Earth's terrible demise.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Red Planet
programme.desc: Three cosmonauts die mysteriously as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere and NASA needs to know why. A declassified document reveals a CIA plan to use a space disaster as a cover to start World War 3. A NASA rover discovers clues that help solve a murder.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: The Big House: Leavenworth
programme.desc: An exclusive look at America's first federal prison. Operating since 1895, Leavenworth has had its share of notoriety - from The Birdman of Alcatraz and exciting escapes to bloody riots and escalating violence.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: The Big House: Kentucky State Penitentiary
programme.desc: Cameras follow an officer on his shift and step inside the Kentucky State Pen high security block.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola
programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: The Big House: Florida State at Raiford
programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.title: American Justice: Framed
programme.desc: The shocking story of Clarence Brandley, an innocent man convicted of murder.

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: We Are Nightwatch Nation
programme.desc: Patrick and Danelle from Yonkers, New York, go above and beyond to help a schizophrenic patient who's had a hard time being taken seriously in the past. Far away in Austin, Texas, Holly and Chris have a scary run-in with poison control.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Stranger Things
programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Pritchert
programme.desc: Craig Pritchert and his girlfriend are a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. After falling in love, the two go on a bank robbery spree, and flee the country with $500,000 in cash. After being spotted in Cape Town, the FBI sends a team to take the two down.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mistress Roulette
programme.desc: Dr. Adam Frasch is living large with a wife and baby. His practice is booming, he loves to spend money on houses, exotic cars, and exotic dancers who become mistresses.

programme.title: Diabolical: Queen of Deception
programme.desc: 2011 is off to a rocky start when a beloved Susanville police officer is found dead. What first looks like suicide morphs into a full blown murder investigation when his wife becomes a suspect and detectives uncover a story of love, lust and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe
programme.desc: A young family in La Mirada, CA is out for an evening stroll when terror strikes. For investigation nothing seems to add up. Is it random violence or a mastermind at work? The truth will take years to emerge.

programme.title: 48 Hours: In Jason's Name
programme.desc: An Irish businessman is killed by his American au-pair-turned-wife and her father. They claim self-defence. The dead man’s sister fights to clear his name.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Bloodiest Bond
programme.desc: What starts as a childhood friendship between identical twin sisters and the older neighborhood boy they both like turns into a turbulent adult romance, and a cry for help that ends in murder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Bloodiest Bond
programme.desc: What starts as a childhood friendship between identical twin sisters and the older neighborhood boy they both like turns into a turbulent adult romance, and a cry for help that ends in murder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: 48 Hours: In Jason's Name
programme.desc: An Irish businessman is killed by his American au-pair-turned-wife and her father. They claim self-defence. The dead man’s sister fights to clear his name.

programme.title: Love Kills: It Was All a Big Fantasy
programme.desc: Josh is living his dream of running his family's farm with his girlfriend Donna by his side. But this perfect fantasy is shattered when Josh's mother takes the farm away from them. Revenge is served with a shotgun blast. But who pulled the trigger?

programme.title: Love Kills: Sheltered to Shackles
programme.desc: Victoria comes from a good family but can't help falling for Raymon, a bad boy from the streets. She quickly falls into a life of crime with him, breaking into homes and cars. When the couple ups the ante to armed robbery, their lives are changed forever.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Devil in the Dance Hall
programme.desc: A murder within the small square dancing community of Texarkana, Arkansas leads investigators through a gauntlet of suspects with alibies and potential motives- including love triangles, jealousy and lots of money.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Family Lies
programme.desc: A reunited family begins to point fingers at each other when a house fire kills one of their own. And somewhere in the ashes are the clues to a murder.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Nightmare on Bennington Drive
programme.desc: This quaint neighbourhood in Jacksonville, Florida seems to be an unlikely place for any crime at all, let alone murder.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Dear Dad
programme.desc: When beloved New England handyman Jack Reid becomes the victim of a violent murder, police have no choice but to look for a killer among his many clients and adoring family. The suspect they ultimately uncover is a sociopath that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Single mom Christina Sanoubane, leaves Jacob Crosson, her abusive boyfriend and father of her two year old son Corbin, to move into her own apartment. But four days later when a friend comes to visit her, Corbin greets him with the words: 'Mommy's dead.'

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Deadly Drive
programme.desc: The investigation into 26-year-old Kim Medlin's mysterious disappearance reveals secrets that shatter the safety and security of everyone in the tight-knit town of Monroe, North Carolina.

programme.title: Betrayed: Pretty in Black
programme.desc: Kelly Bullwinkle is a 17-year-old desperate to find her place among the students of her Southern California high school. When a secret affair with her friend's boyfriend goes wrong, Kelly is given one final lesson in death.

programme.title: Betrayed: Family Fatale
programme.desc: Ruie Ann Park is the J.R. Ewing of Van Buren, AR – wealthy and sharp-tongued, but fair. She rules with her town with wit and flair, until her son's increasingly scandalous lifestyle and others' lust for her money bring her to a bitter, horrific end.

programme.title: Betrayed: Keep Your Friends Close…
programme.desc: 32-year-old Anna Lisa Raymundo seems to have it all a skyrocketing career, a beautiful home and a loving boyfriend. But a secret betrayal cuts her dreams of a family short.

programme.title: Betrayed: Beware the Au Pair
programme.desc: When Tara Lynn Grant, a 34-year-old mother of two goes missing, police can find no trace of her until a gruesome discovery turns the case into a statewide manhunt.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Football Fatale
programme.desc: Star Washington Redskins safety Sean Taylor is shot dead by an intruder in his Miami home. And when it comes to the rich and famous, it seems like everybody has a motive...

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: The Indestructibles
programme.desc: When it comes to military hardware, tough is what keeps you alive. Take a look at the toughest military hardware on the planet.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surprise Attack
programme.desc: Whether the fight is on land, sea or in the air, one factor can be totally decisive: surprise. Getting the drop on your opponent can win the fight before it's begun. We're counting down the top ten stealthiest war machines across every class of weapon.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Maximum Horsepower
programme.desc: Whether the battle is fought on land, sea or air there is one thing that every war machine needs: power.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surgical Strikers
programme.desc: The ability to deploy precision strike weapons has completely changed the nature of war. Advances in weapon technology have made it possible to send a missile through a specific window of a building from a thousand miles away.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Ultimate Firepower
programme.desc: A showcase of the heaviest hitting military hardware on the planet.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Long Range Strikers
programme.desc: In every theatre of war, long-range weaponry gives you the ability to reach out and touch your opponent while staying out of harm's way. It's a critical edge that can be the difference between victory and defeat.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surgical Strikers
programme.desc: The ability to deploy precision strike weapons has completely changed the nature of war. Advances in weapon technology have made it possible to send a missile through a specific window of a building from a thousand miles away.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Maximum Horsepower
programme.desc: Whether the battle is fought on land, sea or air there is one thing that every war machine needs: power.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: We'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: American Titans: Daly vs. Clark
programme.desc: The lawless territory of 1880's Montana remains up for grabs. Two relentless American Titans, William Clark and Marcus Daly, find themselves in a war to control power over the state and to mine millions in copper ore hidden in the 'richest hill on earth.'

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.desc: The builders work with three centuries of materials and techniques in one project. Using custom 21st century steel brackets and hand-hewn 19th century beams, they create a pavilion for the Wild Rock Community Center.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Island Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving a Pre-Civil War Log Cabin From West Virginia to Tennessee
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a pre-Civil War log cabin in Braxton County, West Virginia. They take it back to Lewisburg to refurbish the logs, then rebuild it for a client who collects historic homes in Elizabethton, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: West Virginia Legacy Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work on saving the O'Dell family's hand-hewn log home. Mark also spends some time with his own father and visits a log cabin built by his great grandfather.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Picture Perfect Cabin
programme.desc: Mark's client has a painting of a log cabin he wants to replicate so the team sets out to find the perfect cabin for the job. After settling on a cabin from an old project, the Barnwood Builders rebuild the structure with its huge logs in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaineer Volunteers
programme.desc: Mark donates a timber frame to his alma mater, West Virginia University, as the latest addition to their pioneer heritage center.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Apres Skihouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete designs a ski chalet treehouse that glistens as bright as the freshest powder atop a black diamond run. The 20-ft high winter retreat comes complete with a secret bedroom and a double-sided fireplace to keep guests warm both inside and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Bon-Appé-Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and his brigade de cuisine cook up a dining room treehouse for a French restaurant.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Party Pad
programme.desc: Pete heads to the Platte River Valley of eastern Nebraska to build a magical, towering treetop castle for a family that has decided to never grow up.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Treehouses IV
programme.desc: Join Pete Nelson on a journey to explore ingenious treehouse designs and engineering feats of builders the world over. At the end of his adventure, Pete embarks on his very own epic treehouse engineering repair.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sunrise Day Camp Clubhouse
programme.desc: Pete constructs an amazing clubhouse for Sunrise Day Camp: a summer camp for kids battling cancer. This open-air treehouse grants campers full interaction with nature by erasing the line between indoors and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t
programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Home Tree Home
programme.desc: A treehouse escape grows into a full-time live-in treehouse when Pete lays eyes on the gargantuan Sitka spruce of his dreams for a hexagonal build on the coast of Oregon.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nelson Family Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete gifts his daughter Emily, and Patrick, her boyfriend and an NTS carpenter, with the ultimate housewarming gift - a treehouse of their very own - by turning a piece of Nelson family history into a Moroccan marvel nested nearly 35 feet off the ground.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Party Pad
programme.desc: Pete heads to the Platte River Valley of eastern Nebraska to build a magical, towering treetop castle for a family that has decided to never grow up.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ozark Mountains
programme.desc: Casey travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes.

programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall criss-crosses America to scare up some ghoulishly good grub and tricked-out treats, including mouth-watering zombie burgers in Atlanta, colossal freak shakes in Salem, Mass., and monstrous Franken-chops in New Orleans.

programme.desc: Nancy puts her investigation into Lucy Sable’s dress on hold to pull off one of her most risky missions yet. Bess and Ace get a enlist the help of a stranger in an attempt to help Nancy. The town gathers to participate in the annual bucket ritual.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Date
programme.desc: Rachel's date with a soap star hunk has Ross in a funk, especially since she's pregnant.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Stain
programme.desc: When Ross learns that Rachel wants to move out, he suggests a vacancy in his building.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Stripper
programme.desc: To make up for Chandler never having a bachelor party, Monica hires a stripper for him. Meanwhile, Rachel tells her father about her pregnancy, and he assumes that she will marry Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Monica's Boots
programme.desc: Chandler is incensed when Monica spends a fortune on a pair of black boots that hurt.

programme.title: Mom: Mozzarella Sticks and a Gay Piano Bar
programme.desc: After Christy and Bonnie get Jodi, a recovering drug addict, back on her feet, they find themselves addicted to the rush of helping others and take on a new 'project' Michelle.

programme.title: Mom: Sawdust and Brisket
programme.desc: Christy is thrilled when Violet tells her she wants to spend more time together and improve their relationship. Also, Bonnie tries to make amends with her nemesis in the building, Beverly.

programme.title: Wipeout: Winter Wipeout: Valentine's Day Couples
programme.desc: Couples battle it out hand-in-hand on the Love Struck and at the Wipeout Wedding Reception.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Co-Ed Softball
programme.desc: Mike must decide which way to vote when the Outdoor Man's softball team gets a mandate to allow females to play. Also, while helping a reluctant Mandy fill out college applications, Kristin makes a few decisions about her own future.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Good Cop, Bad Cop
programme.desc: When Mandy wants to enter a contest to be on a TV modeling show, Vanessa demands that Mike play 'bad cop' for once and tell her she's not allowed.

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.title: Freethought Matters: Hector Avalos
programme.desc: Iowa State University religious studies professor Hector Avalos, who is a humanist ethics advocate, secular biblical scholar, cultural anthropologist, author and atheist, joins us today.

programme.title: Elementary: Flight Risk
programme.desc: Sherlock tries to prove that one of the people whose body was found in the wreckage of a small plane crash was actually killed before the plane went down. Meanwhile, Watson tries to convince Sherlock to meet with his elusive father.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: I Drank the Mold!
programme.desc: During the birthday sleepover Beverly has planned, Adam's friend Garry shares his dad's home brewed beer and gets everyone sick. Many of the parents believe Adam is a bad influence and forbid his friends from hanging out with him.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: La Biblioteca Es Libros
programme.desc: Beverly cannot believe Adam is failing Spanish class and blames his teacher. Beverly speaks with Senora Taraborelli and pays her to tutor Adam instead of putting him in remedial Spanish.

programme.desc: Dre thinks Rainbow is questioning his machismo after another man dismisses him in front of her, but when Pops swoops in to help his son save face, Ruby is attracted to his show of manliness and the couple reignite their love affair.

programme.title: Black-ish: Gap Year
programme.desc: After dropping Junior off at college, Dre and Bow are beside themselves when they find him back at home announcing his decision to take a gap year. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane begin to question whether they should still be sharing a room.

programme.title: All American: Never No More
programme.desc: Spencer gives his Dad an ultimatum about his new player. Coop decides to enter a freestyle battle. Olivia reluctantly joins the So Cal Muse group. Layla is still not acting like herself and Spencer gets concerned after what he sees.

programme.title: Black Lightning: The Book of Occupation: Chapter Three
programme.desc: When Lynn learns that Jefferson brokered a deal with Agent Odell without consulting her first, it begins to put a strain on their relationship. Meanwhile, Anissa and Grace have an emotional encounter.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Lesbian Wedding
programme.desc: The gang attends the wedding of Ross's ex-wife where Monica is the caterer.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Wife
programme.desc: Jerry's girlfriend poses as his wife to receive a dry-cleaning discount.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Molly Unleashed
programme.desc: When Molly finds herself at a crossroads with her career, she makes a huge decision.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That's Summer Sausage, Not Salami
programme.desc: After getting to know Danielle, Charlie discovers that she shares some common interests with Alan and proceeds to set them up, but when things begin to heat up between them, Charlie becomes jealous.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Just Say No
programme.desc: As the presidential election approaches, Erica finds herself strongly supporting candidate Walter Mondale. After learning Beverly always votes for whomever Murray tells her to vote for, Erica sets out to educate her mother.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Tasty Boys
programme.desc: Murray doesn't budge when Beverly wants to remodel their kitchen like the Kremps, so Beverly devises a plan to do the work herself. She messes it up on purpose so Murray will be forced to fix it, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Pearl Necklace
programme.desc: Max and Caroline attempt to keep faith that Martha Stewart, who tasted and liked one of their cupcakes, will call and help support their business. Meanwhile, Caroline loses a lucky keepsake.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Let Them Eat (Cup) Cake!
programme.desc: While Melanie is away interviewing for a residency position at Johns Hopkins in D.C., Derwin does everything he can to avoid returning to an empty home. Meanwhile, Tasha renews her commitment to celibacy by joining the 'cupcake club.'

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Dad Hat
programme.desc: Kristin is surprised that Mike is treating her more like a dad than her boss when she tells him she wants to oversee the opening of the next Outdoor Man Grill restaurant.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Miller vs. Walters
programme.desc: He had plans to make her his wife, but instead a man appears in court to find out if his girlfriend is still cheating and if he fathered her two-year-old son.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Back to School; Finders Keepers
programme.desc: Two women argue over a laptop. A woman claims her intern stole her client.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Rascally Rats/ Mom Blog Mishap
programme.desc: A man claims his pest problem is a direct result of his neighbour's negligence and a promotional deal over clothing and publicity goes awry.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Jenkins vs. Hensley
programme.desc: A man breaks off an engagement and has one foot out the door because he doubts he fathered his girlfriend's 'miracle baby'.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Get With the Program/ Missing Life Benefits
programme.desc: Mentor sues for reimbursement of music camp fees; man sues Uncle over grandmother's will.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The Plaintiff and the Defendant broke up because the Plaintiff admitted emotional issues damaged their relationship. The Defendant is suing his ex for the balance of an unpaid loan and a television, which she says he forgave.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Being Sloppy ; Give Me My Money; Being a Gold Digger.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Roughneck Owes Childcare/ Spoiled Family Cookout
programme.desc: A woman sues for unpaid child care; plaintiff sues her aunt for food poisoning.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A fitness trainer's client demands a refund after not getting desired results. Then, a cheque to purchase a plot of land doesn't go through, but the buyers say they were being conned by the seller and are countersuing.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Child Abuse: No One Believes My Story
programme.desc: Lisa and Erik's son was removed from their home after what Erik says was an accidental fall. Lisa now has doubts about the story. Then, Tessa is accused of trying to strangle her infant son, but she say it's all just a freak accident.

programme.title: Maury: Don't Trust My Sister ... She Told Me You're Not Her Baby's Father
programme.desc: Kristen needs to take a DNA test to see if her husband Tanner or her ex Hunter is the father of her son. Shameka says her boyfriend Marcus was brainwashed by her sister Raven, and now Marcus is uncertain he's her baby's father.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Fabulous Fights
programme.desc: Deyoun regrets hooking up with Tiffany, a woman who took him in when he had no place to go. He considers her life family, but she is madly in love with him.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: Movie: Arachnophobia
programme.desc: Deadly spiders from South America terrorize the residents of a small California town.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: The Hudsucker Proxy
programme.desc: A naïve Indiana boy goes to New York in 1958 to sell his idea for the hula hoop.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Hail, Caesar!
programme.desc: A 1950's Hollywood fixer for a movie company cleans up after big names and stars in the industry, but must deal with more than fixing problems when a star disappears.

programme.title: Movie: Lottery Ticket
programme.desc: A young man must survive a long weekend after his neighbours in the projects learn that he has a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Movie: Puerto Ricans in Paris
programme.desc: Two Puerto Rican detectives, Luis and Eddie, are sent to Paris to find the stolen handbag designs of a major fashion designer. The hopelessly unhip pair attempt to navigate the city as they deal with high society fashion and its seedy black market.

programme.title: Movie: Hannah and Her Sisters
programme.desc: A family begins to fall apart when a woman's husband falls for her beautiful sister.

programme.title: Movie: Waking Ned Devine
programme.desc: Two friends attempt to get their greedy hands on a dead man's winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic
programme.desc: After woman who has spent her whole life feeling cynical about love and romance suffers a nasty hit to the head, she wakes up to find herself living in a romantic comedy, complete with new friends and a new love interest vying for her attention.

programme.title: Movie: Jack Goes Boating
programme.desc: A limo driver's blind date sparks a tale of love, betrayal, friendship and grace centered around two working-class New York City couples.

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A pregnant Sophie grows closer to her mother as she shares stories of how she came to live on a Greek island and how she met three handsome young men, any of whom could be Sophie's father, but an unexpected visit from Sophie's grandmother changes things.

programme.title: Movie: The Ref
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a cat burglar takes a bickering couple hostage and ends up providing counselling for them.

programme.title: Movie: The Family Fang
programme.desc: Baxter and Annie's parents are notorious practical jokesters, but when mom and dad suddenly and mysteriously disappear, the siblings must investigate to find out if it's just another ruse or if there's cause for concern.
